_readme: SAMPLE DATA — a fictional maker (Sam Rivers). Replace by running the real pipeline on your own export. projects[]: id,title,category,era,desc,stack,status(live|soon|building|archived),flagship,visibility(reveal|vault).

projects.title: TabTamer
projects.desc: a browser extension that auto-groups your tabs by what you're actually doing.

projects.title: LoopDeck
projects.desc: a tiny rhythm game where the level is the song's own waveform.

projects.title: QuietInbox
projects.desc: summarizes a noisy newsletter folder into one calm morning digest.

projects.title: FieldNotes
projects.desc: a plain-text journaling cli that turns entries into a searchable garden.

projects.title: PalmSynth
projects.desc: a pocket synthesizer on a $4 microcontroller, one knob, endless drones.

projects.title: RecipeGraph
projects.desc: point a photo of your fridge at it, get a graph of what you can cook.

projects.title: DawnTimer
projects.desc: a gentle focus timer that follows the actual sunrise where you live.

projects.title: SpriteFarm
projects.desc: a little zoo of pixel creatures that evolve from your git commits.
